title: The Quicksand Question
desc: The town's duck bridge money vanishes — and the thieves may have sunk it in quicksand! 🏜️

q.en: What were the kids collecting money for in the big duck-shaped bank?
q.zh: 孩子们把零钱存进那只大鸭子形状的储蓄罐，是为了什么？

options.en: To build a bridge so ducks could cross the road safely
options.zh: 修一座桥，让鸭子能安全过马路

options.en: To pay for a new fire truck

explain.en: The town saved for a year to build a special bridge so mother ducks and ducklings could cross River Road without being hit by cars.
explain.zh: 全镇存了一年钱，想修一座专门的桥，让鸭妈妈和小鸭子能安全穿过河路，避免被车撞到。

q.en: Who took Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose's saved money from the barn?
q.zh: 是谁把丁克、乔希和露丝·罗丝存在谷仓里的钱拿走了？

options.en: Josh's little twin brothers, Bradley and Brian
options.zh: 乔希的双胞胎小弟弟布拉德利和布莱恩

explain.en: The twins found the money in the barn and called it 'pirate treasure,' but they gave it back after the kids explained it was for the ducks.
explain.zh: 双胞胎弟弟在谷仓里发现了钱，喊它“海盗宝藏”，但孩子们解释那是给鸭子用的之后，他们就把钱还了回来。

q.en: What did Ruth Rose find in the ashes of the meadow fire?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝在草地上那场火灾的灰烬里，发现了什么？

options.en: A partly burned piece of wood stamped 'ET CO'
options.zh: 一块烧焦的木头，上面印着“ET CO”

explain.en: She found a charred board with black ink letters 'ET CO' stamped on it — an important clue about where the wood came from.
explain.zh: 她发现一块烧黑的木板，上面用黑墨水印着“ET CO”——这是关于木头来源的重要线索。

q.en: What did the letters 'ET CO' on the burned wood actually stand for?
q.zh: 烧焦木头上的“ET CO”其实代表什么？

explain.en: Ellie the diner owner showed them a pallet stamped EASTERN PALLET COMPANY, and the printing matched the burned piece exactly.
explain.zh: 餐厅老板埃莉给他们看了一个印着“东方托盘公司”的托盘，字迹和那块烧焦的木头一模一样。

q.en: Who saw a jeep speeding up Main Street after the fire, nearly running over his dog?
q.zh: 是谁在火灾后看到一辆吉普车在主干道上飞驰，差点撞到他的狗？

explain.en: Elderly Mr. Pocket was walking his dog Randolph when a jeep tore past and nearly hit them; he later told the kids which way it went.
explain.zh: 年长的波基特先生正遛他的狗兰道夫，一辆吉普车飞驰而过差点撞到他们；后来他告诉孩子们车往哪个方向去了。

q.en: What did Mr. Pocket think was a 'giant duck' sitting beside the driver?
q.zh: 波基特先生以为坐在司机旁边的“巨型大鸭子”其实是什么？

explain.en: The moon reflected off the clear plastic duck bank, making its shiny head and beak look like a bald man with a big nose.
explain.zh: 月光照在透明的鸭子储蓄罐上反光，让它亮亮的脑袋和“嘴”看起来像个光头大鼻子的人。

q.en: How did the kids know the jeep was heading NORTH on River Road?
q.zh: 孩子们怎么判断出吉普车在河路上往北开？

options.en: Mr. Pocket saw it near Indian Way Road coming from the fire station, so it had to go north
options.zh: 波基特先生在印第安路附近看到它从消防站方向来，所以只能往北

options.en: They followed tire tracks going south
options.zh: 他们顺着往南的车辙追踪

options.en: Officer Fallon told them the direction
options.zh: 法伦警官告诉了他们方向

options.en: The jeep had a big sign on it
options.zh: 吉普车上挂着大字招牌

explain.en: Since the jeep came from the fire station and passed Mr. Pocket at Indian Way Road, Ruth Rose reasoned it could only be traveling north.
explain.zh: 既然吉普车从消防站来，又在印第安路附近被波基特先生看到，露丝·罗丝推断它只能是往北开。

q.en: What happened to Josh when he waded into the river?
q.zh: 乔希蹚进河里时发生了什么？

options.en: He found the duck bank right away
options.zh: 他立刻找到了鸭子储蓄罐

options.en: He got stuck in quicksand and had to be rescued
options.zh: 他陷进流沙，必须被人救出来

options.en: He swam across to the other side

explain.en: Josh stepped into a pocket of quicksand; firefighters Jake and Lenny pulled him and Dink out with a ladder.
explain.zh: 乔希踩进了一处流沙；消防员杰克和伦尼用梯子把他和丁克拉了出来。

q.en: How did the firefighters get the jeep — and the duck bank — out of the quicksand?
q.zh: 消防员是怎么把吉普车（和鸭子储蓄罐）从流沙里弄出来的？

options.en: They dove in and lifted it by hand
They used a rescue truck's cable and hook to pull it out
options.zh: 他们用救援卡车的钢缆和钩子把它拉出来

options.en: They used a forklift from the supermarket
They just waited for it to float up
options.zh: 他们只是等它自己浮上来

explain.en: Lenny swam out, hooked the jeep's bumper, and Jake used the rescue truck's winch to haul it onto the riverbank.
explain.zh: 伦尼游过去钩住吉普车的保险杠，杰克用救援卡车的绞盘把它拖上了河岸。

q.en: Who was the thief, and how was he caught?
q.zh: 贼是谁，又是怎么被抓住的？

options.en: Martin Fleece, a supermarket worker; the apron name tag and jeep papers led Officer Fallon to him
options.zh: 超市员工马丁·弗利斯；围裙上的名牌和吉普车证件让法伦警官找到了他

explain.en: A wet apron labeled 'HI! I'M MARTIN' and the jeep's registration revealed Martin Fleece, a supermarket worker, who was arrested as he tried to quit and leave town.
explain.zh: 一条湿围裙上写着“你好！我是马丁”，加上吉普车的登记信息，指认出超市员工马丁·弗利斯；他正想辞职离镇时被逮捕。
